ocr_findings.description: Image is a 2-column dense review layout covering chapters 5-8 (システム投資/ROI/要件定義/RFI/RFP in left; 6章 ソフトウェア開発ライフサイクル through リファクタリング; 7章 プロジェクト管理; 8章 ITIL/SLM). OCR linearizes all into single-column list, losing 2-column structure.

OCR starts with '# ステム投資効果を予測する' — the initial character 'シ' of 'システム' is missing, rendering as 'ステム'. This is a character truncation at the start of a section heading, likely due to a page-break split.

reviewer_notes: Continuation of 重要用語を総復習 covering chapters 5-8. Two issues: 'シ' dropped from 'システム' in the opening heading (med severity truncation), and 2-column layout linearized to single column. All bullet-point term definitions appear to be captured despite layout flattening. No high-severity findings.
